title: Infected Elytra
description: This texture pack adds infected elytra to the game
body:
### Infected Elytra
Enter a world of corruption and transformation with the Infected Elytra texture pack! Forget boring, mundane wings - it's time for something more... sinister. This pack turns your elytra into creepy, infected growths full of rotten veins.

**Ready to feel like you're part of something bigger? Download Infected Elytra and let the infection consume your flights!**
